name: Instant Chocolate Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream until almost stiff.
2. Add sugar and vanilla extract to the whipped cream and mix well.
3. Crumble a quarter of the chocolate wafers and place them in the bottom of a pie plate.
4. Spread one-fifth of the whipped cream mixture over the cookies.
5. Arrange strawberries on top of the cream.
6. Place more cookies on top of the strawberries.
7. Repeat steps 4-5 until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of whipped cream and strawberries.
8. Cover the cake with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours before serving.
